sections.title: Connectivity of Minimizers from a Given Dataset
content: Mode Connectivity: Minimizers of modern NNs retrieved using SGD on a dataset can be connected via simple paths of zero loss.

figures.description: ResNet-164在CIFAR-100上的训练损失地形图，展示了连接两个极小值的简单路径。

sections.title: Motivating Problem: Are Minimizers Retrieved from Different Datasets of a Task Connected?
content: Q1: Are mechanistically dissimilar models, which rely on different input attributes to make predictions, connected?
Q2: Can we exploit this connectivity?

figures.description: 背景极小值与形状极小值之间是否存在线性或二次路径的示意图。

sections.title: Towards a Definition of Mechanistic Similarity
content: We use shared invariances to interventions on the data-generating process to define a notion ofMechanistic Similaritybetween two models.

figures.description: 通过语义干预和噪声干预定义机制相似性的流程图。

sections.title: Synthetically Inducing Mechanistically Dissimilar Models
content: A data-generating process that synthetically embeds controllable, partially predictive cues in the data.
Evaluation: Counterfactuals that break predictivity of label by altering synthetic versus natural attributes.
Goal: Analyze connectivity of models that rely vs. ignore spurious attributes.

figures.description: 合成数据生成过程中的潜在变量关系图。
包含CIFAR-10/100和Fashion-MNIST的合成数据集示例，展示了不同类型的提示（Cue）。

sections.title: Result 1: Are Mechanistically Dissimilar Minimizers Connected? Yes!
content: Proposition. (Mode Connectivity under Mechanistic Dissimilarity.)Assume θ₁, θ₂ are minimizers of the loss on a dataset D and induce mechanistically dissimilar models. Given sufficient over-parameterization, there exists a continuous path along which the minimizers are mode connected.

figures.description: 在不同提示比例下，ResNet-18模型在二次路径上的训练准确率曲线。

sections.title: Result 2: Is Mechanistic Similarity and Simplicity of Connectivity Paths Related? Yes!
content: Conjecture. (Lack of Linear Connectivity implies Mechanistic Dissimilarity.)If two minimizers θ₁ and θ₂ cannot be linear mode connected, their induced models must be mechanistically dissimilar.

figures.description: 小学习率下的测试准确率连接路径。
中等学习率下的测试准确率连接路径。
大学习率下的测试准确率连接路径。

sections.title: Result 3: Altering Mechanisms via Lack of Linear Connectivity
content: Connectivity-Based Fine-Tuning (CBFT): Find a minimizer that lacks linear connectivity but is invariant to the undesirable attribute.
* ResNet-18 models trained on located cue CIFAR-10 (C) and fine-tuned on data w/o cue (FT) show linear connectivity under small-medium learning rates.

tables.description: 不同微调方法（FTm, FTs, LLR, LPFT, CBFT）在不同提示数据比例下的性能对比表。

figures.description: 展示损失壁垒（Barrier）与不变性（Invariance）之间关系的示意图。
